notes: Fixed installer manifest reading with UTF-8 BOM and old portable manifest fallback.
changelog: v0.2.2 - Fixed installer manifest reading with UTF-8 BOM and old portable manifest fallback.
v0.2.1 - Fixed resource manifest selection so online downloads work after updating from older portable builds.
v0.2.0 - Added online installer resources from networkbgs.com with speed, ETA, package count, and SHA256 verification.
v0.1.9 - Added cache-busting update metadata checks to prevent stale GitHub raw responses.
v0.1.8 - Switched update metadata and package downloads to refs/heads/main to avoid stale GitHub raw cache.
v0.1.7 - Fixed automatic updater download path and added WGA-update.log diagnostics.
v0.1.6 - Added automatic installer menu with checkboxes and one-click sequential installation.
v0.1.5 - Added update history button and popup notification for available updates.
v0.1.4 - Added automatic update installer with download, file replacement, and restart.
v0.1.3 - Added Bulgarian update messages and clearer GitHub raw diagnostics.
v0.1.2 - Added language status panel, Adobe Reader version check, resource manager, icon, and UI fixes.
